documents.text:
Patient: Clark Kent
Member ID: HAI-011
Diagnosis: Active severe Rheumatoid Arthritis
Requested Service: Humira (adalimumab) 40mg SC every 2 weeks.
Methotrexate failed due to lack of efficacy after 24 weeks.
TB screen negative via QuantiFERON gold lab.
Primary Care Physician prescribing.
Status: DENIED
Reason for Denial: Prior authorization guidelines require a specialist prescription.

Patient: Hal Jordan
Member ID: HAI-012
Diagnosis: Moderate to severe Rheumatoid Arthritis
Requested Service: Humira.
Methotrexate initiated but discontinued by patient after 2 weeks due to mild nausea.
TB screen is negative.
Rheumatologist prescribing.
Status: DENIED
Reason for Denial: Conventional DMARD trial duration is insufficient.

Patient: Bruce Wayne
Member ID: HAI-013
Diagnosis: Severe Crohn's Disease
Requested Service: Humira starter pack.
Patient failed conventional therapy with sulfasalazine.
TB test clear.
Gastroenterologist prescribing.
Status: DENIED
Reason for Denial: Patient currently hospitalized with active systemic sepsis infection.

Patient: Arthur Curry
Member ID: HAI-014
Diagnosis: Plaque Psoriasis and Ulcerative Colitis
Requested Service: Humira.
Patient is currently responding well to Stelara infusions for Colitis.
Dermatologist requests adding Humira concurrently to address skin flares.
TB screening negative.
Status: DENIED
Reason for Denial: Concomitant dual advanced biologic therapy is prohibited.

Patient: Victor Fries
Member ID: HAI-015
Diagnosis: Moderate to severe Rheumatoid Arthritis
Requested Service: Humira.
Methotrexate is completely bypassed because the patient has Stage 4 chronic kidney disease and severe renal failure.
TB screening verified negative.
Rheumatologist prescribing.
Status: DENIED
Reason for Denial: Medical exception documentation requires human specialist review.

Patient: Dick Grayson
Member ID: HAI-016
Diagnosis: Plaque Psoriasis
Requested Service: Humira.
Topical steroids failed after 3 months. TB screen negative.
Dermatologist prescribing.
Clinical note states patches are cosmetically frustrating but lacks documentation of affected Body Surface Area (BSA) or PASI score.
Status: DENIED
Reason for Denial: Severity metrics were not established.

Patient: Barbara Gordon
Member ID: HAI-017
Presentation: Severe polyarthritis and joint pain.
Requested Service: Humira.
Differential diagnoses include Rheumatoid Arthritis vs. Lyme Arthritis. Serology is currently pending.
Methotrexate failed after 12 weeks. TB test negative.
Rheumatologist prescribing.
Status: DENIED
Reason for Denial: Definitively covered diagnosis is not established.

Patient: Tim Drake
Member ID: HAI-018
Diagnosis: Rheumatoid Arthritis
Requested Service: Humira.
Rheumatologist notes patient completed a full 6-month course of Methotrexate with absolute failure of therapeutic response.
Patient never picked up or initiated conventional DMARD Methotrexate therapy due to compliance tracking discrepancies.

Patient: Selina Kyle
Member ID: HAI-019
Diagnosis: Severe Ankylosing Spondylitis
Requested Service: Humira.
Patient previously tested positive for latent TB but has now completed a full, verified 9-month course of Isoniazid prophylactic therapy.
Infectious disease clears the patient for anti-TNF biologic initiation.
Prescribed by a board certified Rheumatologist.
Status: DENIED

Patient: Oliver Queen
Member ID: HAI-020
Diagnosis: Severe Crohn's Disease
Requested Service: Humira.
Gastroenterologist explicitly orders immediate biologic intervention.
TB test clear. Conventional immunosuppressants failed.
Medical director review finds the patient's Crohn's disease is currently classified as mild, contradicting the provider statement.
